text: Care and Cleaning (D) k| ® Always clean the hand blender and the suitable accessories thoroughly for first use and after every use with water and detergent. ® Unplug hand blender before cleaning. ® Do notimmerse the motor part (4) or gearboxes (9a) in water or any other liquid. Clean with a damp cloth only. © The lid (10a) can be rinsed under running water. Do not immerse in water, nor place in a dishwasher. ® All other parts can be cleaned in a dish- washer. Do not use abrasive cleaners that could scratch the surface. © You may remove the anti-slip rubber ring from the bottom of the bowl for an extra thorough clean. ® When processing foods with high pig- ment content (e.g. carrots), the accesso- ries may become discolored. Wipe these parts with vegetable oil before cleaning them.
